case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT DISPOSITION: $5,504.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT DISPOSITION: $5,504.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
